nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Shovel-billed kookaburra
nodes.summary: Shovel-billed kookaburra（Shovel-billed kookaburra，学名 Dacelo rex），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于海平面。

nodes.name: 海平面
nodes.summary: 海平面是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括桂红蜂鸟、White-fronted scops owl、恐鴞等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Pratt|title=Birds of New Guinea: Distribution, Taxonomy, and Systematics |url=https://books.google.com/books?id=wRR1CwAAQBAJ&pg=PA226 |year=2016 |publisher=Princeton University Press|isbn=978-1-4008-8071-3|pages=226–227}} It primarily occurs in hill forests, but has been recorded from sea-level up to an altitude of 2400 m (7850 ft). The shovel-billed kookaburra finds its food in mud or on moist ground
